presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 02 — FNA Diagnostic Workshop

slides.title: Business Tool Comparison Map
slides.body: Map how different ventures diagnose before they deliver.
slides.speakerNotes: Squads add their own examples beyond restaurant/doctor/mechanic.

slides.title: FNA Dyad Protocol
slides.body: 8 min discovery / 4 min feedback / swap roles.

slides.title: Client Persona Cards
slides.body: Use Week 1 persona or validated segment from Week 2.
slides.speakerNotes: Client stays in character. Advisor practices diagnosis only.

slides.title: Needs Documentation
slides.speakerNotes: FNA notes feed Client Growth Engine later — preview only.

slides.title: Day 12 Deliverables
slides.body: FNA discovery notes + business tool comparison map uploaded.
slides.speakerNotes: Preview Day 13: Why this business scales.
